## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] `just gates` passes (format, lint, types, full test suite)
- [ ] New behavior has a test (unit for local logic, live-server for anything on the wire)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `## Unreleased` updated if this is user-visible
- [ ] Docstrings are plain markdown (no Sphinx `:role:` — see `docs/decisions.md`)
- [ ] No new suppression without an inline justification
